# flashblade_target (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade replication target by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read an existing replication target by name.
data "flashblade_target" "existing" {
  name = "s3-replication-target"
}

output "target_address" {
  value = data.flashblade_target.existing.address
}

output "target_status" {
  value = data.flashblade_target.existing.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the target to look up.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) The hostname or IP address of the target S3 endpoint.
- `ca_certificate_group` (String) The name of the CA certificate group used to validate the target's TLS certificate. Null when not set.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the target.
- `status` (String) The connection status of the target (e.g. connected, connecting, error).
- `status_details` (String) Additional details about the connection status.
